9.name: Rhetoric & Political Pressure
9.description: State media narrative shift, political crisis, coercion escalation
9.summary: Checked Xinhua, Global Times, Focus Taiwan, Taipei Times for rhetoric shifts or political crisis keywords. Normal levels (3 of 4 feeds reachable).

7.name: Diplomatic Signals
7.description: Travel advisories upgraded, China restricts travel to Taiwan
7.summary: Checked US, UK, Japan, Australia travel advisories for Taiwan. All at normal levels (3 of 4 sources reachable).

10.name: Financial Stress
10.description: TWD/USD spike, TAIEX drop beyond normal volatility
10.summary: Checked TWD/USD exchange rate and TAIEX index via Yahoo Finance. Both within normal volatility range.

3.name: Airspace Control
3.description: NOTAM closures near Fujian/Strait, civilian flight rerouting
3.summary: Checked OpenSky (65 flights in strait, normal: 50-150). No military closures or flight rerouting anomalies. Failed: NOTAMs (NOTAM_API_URL not configured).

4.name: Maritime Control
4.description: MSA exclusion zones, shipping avoidance, fishing fleet recall
4.summary: Checked China Maritime Safety Administration for exclusion zones, shipping restrictions, fishing fleet recalls. None found.

5.name: Taiwan Domestic Readiness
5.description: Taiwan MND raises alert level, cancels leave, activates reserves
5.summary: Checked Taiwan MND, Focus Taiwan for alert-level changes, leave cancellations, reserve activations. None found.

6.name: Cyber & Infrastructure
6.description: Cyberattacks on Taiwan infra, cable cuts, GNSS jamming
6.summary: Checked TWCERT, Cloudflare Radar, IODA for cyberattacks, internet outages, cable disruptions. None detected.

1.name: Force Concentration
1.description: PLA ship/aircraft/missile repositioning beyond exercise norms
1.summary: Observed act from tier-2 OSINT only — low confidence. Checked X/OSINT accounts, Taiwan MND. Failed: Japan MOD (blocked).

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: China is the only nation investing in giant hovercraft, pursuing series production of the Zubr-class vessels for amphibio
evidence_quotes.why: Capability/doctrine commentary on PLA amphibious assets, not a specific observed repositioning event.

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: 近日南部戰區空軍 地空導彈第19旅（95169部隊）同信息通信旅（95007部隊）於北部灣兩地遂行協同抗擊演訓
evidence_quotes.why: Reports PLA Southern Theater SAM and comms brigades conducting joint air-defense drills in Beibu Gulf - routine exercise activity.

1.rationale: [analyst_commentary/vocabulary_only] Capability/doctrine commentary on PLA amphibious assets, not a specific observed repositioning event. [reported_event/observed_act] Reports PLA Southern Theater SAM and comms brigades conducting joint air-defense drills in Beibu Gulf - routine exercise activity.
